title: Library of Systems
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Library of Systems''' was a vast database containing information on every [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] [[Star system/Legends|system]] known to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. [[Scout/Legends|Scouts]] were required to register newly-discovered systems in this database.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-03-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts]]''
